signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY, Up from 2.00% but Below Forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate for March 2026 rose to 2.16% year-over-year from 2.00% in February, with month-over-month inflation at 0.34% and the Consumer Price Index at 118.8[1][3]. This figure slightly exceeds the prior month but fell short of market expectations of

signals.headline: Strait of Hormuz Status Disputed | UNCLEAR | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Strait of Hormuz Status Disputed | UNCLEAR | MED confidence**
Trump announced Iran would "immediately open the Strait of Hormuz" as part of the ceasefire,[1] but Iranian state media reported on April 10 that "the Strait of Hormuz is closed."[3] This contradiction suggests uncertainty about actual implementation.

signals.headline: Peace Talks Underway in Islamabad | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Peace Talks Underway in Islamabad | YES | HIGH confidence**
U.S. Vice President JD Vance, Trump's special envoy Steve Witkoff, and son-in-law Jared Kushner arrived in Islamabad on April 11 for talks with Iranian officials, including Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi.[1] These negotiations aim to finalize a conclusive peace agreement.[2]
